behavior_categories.rule: Combine accepted field bounds and preserve one issue per field in accepted order.
Exercise opaque byte payloads only within the accepted 0 through 4097 byte boundary range.
Combine accepted inserted, duplicate, and unavailable outcomes with exact final-state and one-call postconditions.
Combine explicit V1 and V2 identities, V1-to-normal adapters, request-version response projection, and accepted priority identities.
Invalid structured input and unknown V2 priority must preserve initial state and make no store call.

seed_categories.expected_failure: store call occurs before complete validation
required priority is not supplied explicitly
normal priority is not selected explicitly
stored priority is missing or altered
record version or explicit normal adaptation is wrong
priority is lost from V2 or exposed in V1
a declared result variant is not handled
new external authority or observable effect is introduced
completion evidence does not name the final source revision

rules: The deterministic ZIP package is outside every agent-readable path.
The locked run manifest records the archive digest without exposing entry paths or expected values to the agent.
The canonical hidden manifest and all package entries are stored in lexical order with fixed timestamps and no compression.
Language-specific locations instantiate semantic roles without changing the category or oracle.
Hidden cases may combine accepted behavior but may not introduce new behavior.
Each entry references one frozen behavior or seed category, and packaging or injection must not modify the locked agent-visible task.
